steps.title: Graph the two equations
steps.content:
Type both equations into Desmos exactly as written:
$$8x+y=-11$$
$$2x^2=y+341$$
The requested value is the $x$-coordinate of an intersection.

steps.title: Read a possible value
steps.content: One intersection has $x=-15$. The question asks for a possible value of $x$, so this matches the choices. The answer is A.
